channel.title: flove making-of — multiuser questions
channel.description: New multiuser design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should the multiuser-pack work?
item.description:
• 2 copies default — Default 2 packs — personal + work. Simple, covers most use cases. • Unlimited — No limit — user creates as many as needed. More flexible, more complexity. • Defer — Don't design yet — wait until the encryption layer is closer to shipping.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Defer
